_readme: Edit per tile type, then run: python tools/render_udg_pool.py
_count: How many canonical UDGs to pick. May exceed default pool size (floor/wall/nasty 16, ramp/conveyor 8, pickup 32).
_include_rooms: Room IDs forced into the canonical set first (count toward limit).
_exclude_rooms: Room IDs not auto-picked as sources (still assigned to nearest slot).
